title: Daughters Lead Police To Mother's Dead Body

beats.description: Dramatic opening with bodycam footage of daughters leading police to their mother's body, followed by narrator introduction of the tragedy.
911 call playback, officer arrival at the scene, initial assessment, and securing the traumatized children.
Neighbor interviews, CCTV review, suspect identification, and the suspect's unexpected 911 surrender call.
Ex-husband interview, family statements, relationship background, and discovery that the murder weapon is registered to the victim.
Extended interrogation of the suspect; self-defense narrative, emotional volatility, and revelations about custody threats and steroid use.
Forensic evidence (phone in victim's dominant hand, hair in gun barrel, contact wound) directly contradicts the self-defense claim.
Suspect requests a lawyer, trial outcome, life sentence without parole, and channel's GoFundMe appeal for the children.
